title: Senior Data Analyst
description:
Management Level
F
EQ Retirement Solutions is transforming the retirement and pensions markets with leading administration and technology solutions. With over 1200 employees globally, 189 years of knowledge and 11 million pension scheme members and policyholders, we are here to help people plan for a confident financial future by delivering innovative, reliable and customer-focused retirement services. Our teams are driven by a shared commitment to excellence, collaboration and making a real impact to the lives of our clients and customers.
Role Summary
The Lead Data Analyst will play a critical senior role within the Data and Reporting team in EQ and wider Data Solutions, with lead responsibilities for the Reporting team in EQ. The lead will provide SME support to all areas of reporting to the team, business and client to ensure high quality, timely and insightful reporting, whilst being a key driver of the data strategy and move to increased automated reporting. The lead will challenge the norm to ensure the successful transition to a more data and customer focussed culture.
Core Duties/Responsibilities
The successful candidate will be responsible for the following:
Lead oversight of all team data/reporting responsibilities ensuring high quality, efficient and on time delivery.
As senior analyst on the team you will build supportive relationships with other members of the team and stakeholders and act as a point of contact for data/reporting related support requirements.
Work closely with Head of function to design, plan and deliver on our data strategy for data and reporting.
Collaborate regularity with other leads across the wider teams to resolve complex problems, ensure consistency in ways of working and cross team support is standard practice.
Act as a point of reference to others in projects in the design and creation of data queries and, where relevant, support the productionisation of data solutions
Represent EQ reporting at key meetings with internal and external clients, including particpation in design workshops to drive out suitable data related solutions that meet stakeholders’ requirements.
Provide line management support to Head of function in their absence to ensure resource is fully supported and available to meet team demand.
Lead on measuring and data/reporting team demand vs. capacity planning to ensure resourcing is suitable and opportunities to increase support to the business area identified
Facilitate and contribute to continuous improvement of data related processes and reporting standards within the team of data analysts
Champion increased levels of automated analysis and reporting, using, developing and/or obtaining the tools and skills required to achieve this.
Escalate any risk/ issues to Head of function in the first instance where identified
Be a role model within the team, demonstrating appropriate behaviours and supporting others
